markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, production, and priorities for Q1.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New CTA Strategy:** A simpler, banner-based CTA will be used to promote gated assets, replacing a more complex code-based implementation. GrowthX will design the banners using N-able's assets.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [**Q1 Content Focus:** The "Attack Resilience" campaign will drive content, linking N-Central (pre-attack), MDR (during), and Cove (post-attack). MDR and Cove are the top product priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [**Content Cadence:** The goal is to increase blog publishing to 5x/week (1x/day) to accelerate data collection, contingent on a steady flow of PMM-approved articles.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [**Roadmap Expansion:** GrowthX will develop a scalable "MDR by vertical" content cluster. Elaine will approve more topics in Airtable and share N-able's campaign calendar to align planning.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)

## Topics

### Q1 Content Focus & Strategy

  - [**Product Priorities:** MDR and Cove are the top 1A/1B products for business growth.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [**"Attack Resilience" Campaign:** A central content theme linking N-able's platforms to the attack lifecycle:](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
      - [**N-Central:** Pre-attack readiness (e.g., endpoint resilience, network segmentation).](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
      - [**MDR:** During-attack response (e.g., incident response).](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
      - [**Cove:** Post-attack recovery (e.g., backup and data protection).](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [**New Cluster Idea: "MDR by Vertical"**](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Capture high-intent, lower-volume search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
      - [**Method:** Use GrowthX's Atlas platform to create a scalable, templated approach for core verticals.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Faster internal approval due to a consistent structure.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)

### CTA Implementation

  - [**Decision:** A simpler, banner-based CTA will be used instead of a code-based solution to avoid security hurdles and simplify implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [**Goal:** Create an "eye-popping" CTA to drive traffic to gated assets or product pages.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [**Assets Needed:**](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
      - [Gated asset list from PMMs.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
      - [N-able design assets (e.g., Figma file) for on-brand banners.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)

### Content Production & Roadmap

  - [**Publishing Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
      - [**Current:** 5 blogs published; 3 scheduled for every-other-day release, plus weekend posts for peak traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
      - [**Goal:** Increase to 1x/day (5x/week) to accelerate data collection, pending a consistent flow of PMM-approved articles.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [**PMM Review Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [**Issue:** Articles marked "multiple product focus" in Airtable may not require review from all listed PMMs.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [**Action:** Elaine will review these articles to confirm if a single PMM is sufficient, streamlining the approval process.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [**Roadmap Management:**](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
      - [**Issue:** The "Approved to Start" queue in Airtable is low (approx. 3 weeks of content).](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
      - [**Action:** Elaine will approve more topics from the "Considering" list to ensure a healthy backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Elaine:**](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [Review "multiple product focus" articles in Airtable to confirm PMM review needs.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [Provide Matt with the gated asset list from PMMs and N-able's design assets.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
      - [Approve more topics in Airtable to build the content backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
      - [Send Matt N-able's content/campaign calendar from Kerry.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
      - [Develop the "MDR by vertical" content cluster and share a draft next week.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [Create new MDR-specific assignments to expand the content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/zmmVqyJFqoJzGxVwwmza1aX3ro6yxj2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
